title: elaeocarpus pagonensis
intro: Elaeocarpus pagonensis, also known as the Pagoda Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus pagonensis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Elaeocarpus pagonensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
